What payment methods do you accept?
Do I get a customer demo?

Which would be better for me, Guru or Pro?

individual projects 117.33 dollars monthly $117.33/mo billed annually instead of 139 dollars monthly $139 Try for free or subscribe What’s inside: Up to 5 websites to monitor Keyword research tools Competitor analysis tools Position Tracking Backlinks Site Audit MCP Access Guru For small businesses 208.33 dollars monthly $208.33/mo billed annually instead of 249 dollars monthly $249 Try for free or subscribe All Pro features plus: Up to 15 websites to monitor Historical data Multi-location and device data Content optimization tools Business For agencies and mid-market companies 416.66 dollars monthly $416.66/mo billed annually instead of 499 dollars monthly $499 Subscribe or try custom plan All Guru features plus: Up to 40 websites to monitor Share of Voice Extended limits API access Migration from third-party tools Compare Plans Pro Guru Business Sortable Website monitoring AI Search Site Audit Site Audit Yes Yes Yes Keywords to track (daily updates) Position Tracking 500 1,500 5,000 Mobile data Position Tracking Yes Yes Yes Targets per monitored website Position Tracking 1 10 unlimited Expand details Improve your plan with add-ons Additional Users Starting at $45/mo • Add colleagues to your Semrush account • Collaborate across shared projects • Keep your account secure with individual logins Lead Generation $90/mo • Branded profile on the Semrush Agency Partners platform • Semrush verified badge for your marketing channels • 1000 outreach credits in Lead Finder Base Report $10/mo • Data from 20+ Semrush tools • Google Analytics and Google Search Console integrations • Monthly/Weekly/Daily scheduling • PDF export • Sharing with Semrush users Pro Report $20/mo • All Base Report features • 20+ external integrations • Delivery at a specific time • Branding and white-labeling • AI-generated summaries • Sharing by link Playing big? Request an Enterprise demo. Full LLM coverage (including Grok & Claude) Detailed analysis by brand, concept, or product line ROI attribution & funnel analysis Request demo FAQ Can I cancel my subscription anytime? Yes, you can cancel your subscription, downgrade or upgrade your plan at any time, unless you have custom terms and a signed agreement with us. What is Semrush’s refund policy? What payment methods do you accept? Do I get a customer demo? Can I use Semrush for free? Am I charged when I enter my credit card? Which would be better for me, Guru or Pro? I run a small agency. What plan should I choose? What is the pricing currency? Testimonials 1 / 5 In the first 5 years of RockContent's existence Semrush has helped us to become Brazil's biggest digital marketing blog. Vitor Peçanha Co-Founder, Rock Content By using Semrush, my team saves a lot of time by working on the right content and in a more data-driven way. Everything we do here is backed up with data, and your tool is giving us more ammunition. Idan Segal Organic Growth Lead, Wix The most important thing I can have really is data. Data is my currency. I need to support initiatives, business cases - any tools that give me insight I find incredibly useful. Semrush is a very solid package that delivers exactly that. Nick Wilsdon Product Owner, Search, Vodafone Group Encouraged by our successes with Semrush software, I was asked to rollout Semrush to the rest of the university including all the faculties. With the help of Semrush, we empowered every single marketing team within the university to do what was done for the central sites. Shefali Joshi Marketing Optimization Analyst, Monash University The competition is really tough. It’s getting harder to compete for the top 3 positions when it comes to the most popular KWs. You have to really deep dive into keyword research to find those untapped opportunities. Semrush helps us get to the very botto
Semrush One new Toolkits SEO Classic AI Visibility Traffic & Market Local Content Social Advertising AI PR Enterprise App center
